title: calestania lancifolia
intro: Calestania lancifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae, native to New South Wales in Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, and is used to treat various health issues such as wound healing and skin irritations. The health benefits of Calestania lancifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and improve skin health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
